category.scope_note: Household refrigerator compliance comparison for China export to the UAE covering MoIAT / ESMA / ECAS / EQM route selection, UAE.S and GSO standard adoptions, energy labelling, electrical safety, EMC, refrigerant controls, and importer obligations.

title.en: China-to-UAE Household Refrigerator Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国家用电冰箱进入阿联酋：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國家用電冰箱進入阿聯酋：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of Chinese household refrigerator documentation against UAE MoIAT/ESMA compliance routes, ECAS and EQM mark pathways, UAE.S and GSO standard references, IEC 60335-2-24 safety baseline, energy-efficiency label expectations, and R-600a refrigerant handling aligned with Montreal/Kigali obligations.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国家用电冰箱与阿联酋MoIAT/ESMA合规路径、ECAS与EQM标志路径、UAE.S与GSO标准引用、IEC 60335-2-24安全底线、能效标识预期以及与蒙特利尔/基加利义务一致的R-600a制冷剂处理进行对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國家用電冰箱與阿聯酋MoIAT/ESMA合規路徑、ECAS與EQM標誌路徑、UAE.S與GSO標準引用、IEC 60335-2-24安全底線、能效標識預期以及與蒙特利爾/基加利義務一致的R-600a製冷劑處理進行對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, customs clearance ruling, regulator approval, or market-access guarantee. Exporters, importers, distributors, and freight planners should verify current UAE MoIAT/ESMA, GCC Standardization Organization, customs, environmental, and utility requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or placement in the UAE market.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、海关裁定、监管批准或市场准入担保。出口商、进口商、经销商与物流计划者在出货或在阿联酋市场投放前，应与合格专业人士核验现行阿联酋MoIAT/ESMA、海湾标准化组织、海关、环境及公用事业要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、海關裁定、監管批准或市場准入擔保。出口商、進口商、經銷商與物流規劃者在出貨或在阿聯酋市場投放前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行阿聯酋MoIAT/ESMA、海灣標準化組織、海關、環境及公用事業要求。

answer_first.en: For China-made household refrigerators entering UAE, the practical gap points are EMC and energy labeling evidence mapping to UAE.S and GSO-referenced baselines, route selection across ECAS and EQM with in-country importer participation, electrical safety evidence under IEC 60335-2-24 with UAE 230/400 V, 50 Hz parameters, and refrigerant handling where R-600a flammability controls are interpreted through UAE safety and environmental controls. Chinese CCC and GB/T/GB evidence is not automatically accepted as UAE conformity evidence.
answer_first.zh: 对中国产家用电冰箱而言，进入阿联酋时的实务差距在于对照UAE.S与GSO引用基线提供EMC和能效标识证据、在ECAS与EQM之间完成合适路径选择并落实本地进口商参与、按阿联酋230/400 V、50 Hz参数依据IEC 60335-2-24提供电气安全证据，以及在适用下按阿联酋安全与环保控制要求处理R-600a可燃性。中国CCC及GB/GB/T文件不能自动替代阿联酋合格评定证据。
answer_first.zht: 對中國家用電冰箱而言，進入阿聯酋時的實務差距在於對照UAE.S與GSO引用基線提供EMC和能效標識證據、在ECAS與EQM之間完成合適路徑選擇並落实本地進口商參與、按阿聯酋230/400 V、50 Hz參數依IEC 60335-2-24提供電氣安全證據，以及在適用下按阿聯酋安全與環保控制要求處理R-600a可燃性。中國CCC及GB/GB/T文件不能自動替代阿聯酋合格評定證據。

editorial_controls.change_policy: Update fragment files when MoIAT/ESMA, UAE.S, GSO, or customs-linked routes change; keep source URLs and published access dates current before republishing.
